title: Greatly Optimizing
description: This project aims to get good FPS in low end PCs or Laptops users. This contains some good mods which allows you to optimise your game and get good FPS without lagg.
body:
Greatly Optimized is a carefully curated modpack designed to enhance the overall gameplay experience while maintaining smooth performance. It not only boosts FPS and reduces lag but also includes a few useful mods to improve quality of life without straying too far from the vanilla feel. Whether you're on a low-end or high-end PC, this modpack ensures an optimized and enjoyable Minecraft experience.

Key Features:

- Improved FPS and reduced lag for smoother gameplay
- Faster chunk loading and better memory management
- Useful mods that enhance the vanilla experience without major changes
- Quality-of-life tweaks for better controls, UI, and general convenience
- Balanced optimizations to maintain performance and gameplay depth
